response:
<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

THE MLE FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF X_i]  
THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF Y_i]  
THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF X_i]  
THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF Y_i]  
THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i]

THE TEST STATISTIC FOR THE HYPOTHESIS TEST IS [THE TEST STATISTIC CALCULATED USING THE MLEs]  
THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [THE NULL HYPOTHESIS STATEMENT]  
THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS STATEMENT]  
THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05]  
THE REJECTION REGION IS [THE REJECTION REGION FOR THE TEST STATISTIC]  
THE P_VALUE IS [THE P_VALUE CALCULATED USING THE TEST STATISTIC]  
THE DECISION IS [THE DECISION BASED ON THE P_VALUE AND REJECTION CRITERIA]
